bids.reasoning: This is the opening at t=0.0 with no opponent offers or messages to infer their preferences, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. With no time pressure yet, I should anchor strongly on my best values across all issues.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, and the opponent’s only offer is the minimum-utility bid for me on every issue, so there is no evidence of meaningful concession yet. I am targeting a very high utility while avoiding an exact repeat of my opening bid, conceding only on my lowest-weight issueA and holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still extremely early at t=0.04 and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeating the all-valueA offer. I will make only a small concession on my lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the more important issues B, C, and D.

I am still targeting a very high utility bid because it is very early in the negotiation (t=0.06), and the opponent has not yet shown any concession, repeatedly offering the lowest-value package for me. I will continue making small concessions only on my lowest-weight issue, issueA, while holding firm on the more important issues B, C, and especially D.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.935 by conceding only on my lowest-weight issue while preserving issueB, issueC, and issueD at my top value. Since it is still very early at t=0.08, there is no need to make large concessions, especially because the opponent has not conceded at all and keeps repeating the all-valueA bid. No opponent messages were provided, so I am relying only on the offer pattern.

I am still targeting a high utility bid because it is very early in the negotiation (t=0.10), and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeatedly offering the minimum values for every issue. I will finish conceding on my lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the much more important issues B, C, and especially D.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.89 because it is still very early at t=0.12, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has held firm at all valueA offers with no concession and no messages, so I will continue conceding only on my lower-weight issues while protecting issueC and issueD.

I targeted a still-high utility bid (about 0.856) by conceding further on the lower-weight issueB while protecting the more important issueC and issueD. It is still early at t=0.14, and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering all valueA, so I will continue gradual concessions rather than making a large drop.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.824 by continuing only small concessions on lower-weight issues while preserving issueC and issueD, which matter most to me. The opponent has held firm at all valueA with no concession, but at t=0.16 it is still early, so I should not collapse toward their position yet; I will make a modest non-repeating concession from my last bid.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.79 by conceding further only on the lower-weight issueB while preserving high-weight issueC and issueD at valueF. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueA with no concession, but it is still early at t=0.18, so I should not drop major issues yet and should avoid repeating my last exact bid.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.76 by conceding fully on the two lowest-weight issues while preserving my highest-weight issues C and D at valueF. The opponent has held firm at all valueA with no concession signal, and since we are only at t=0.20 I should not rush to concede on the more important issues yet, but I will avoid repeating my previous bid.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.712 by keeping my highest-weight issueD at valueF while conceding further on issueC. Time is still early at t=0.22, so I should not move close to the opponent’s all-valueA position yet, especially since their offers show no concession at all.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.66, since time is only at 0.24 and it is too early to give up my highest-weight issueD. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueA with no concession, so I will continue a controlled concession on issueC while holding issueD at valueF.

I am targeting a utility around 0.62 by continuing gradual concessions on lower/medium priority issues while holding issueD, my highest-weight issue, at valueF. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueA with no concession, and with time still only at 0.26 I should not collapse to their position, but I will avoid repeating my last bid and make a modest move on issueC.

I am targeting a utility around 0.565 by conceding further on lower-priority issues while preserving issueD, my most important issue, at valueF. Time is still only 0.28, so I should not collapse to the opponent’s all-valueA demand yet; the opponent has shown no concession at all and has sent no messages, so I will make a measured concession from my previous bid rather than accept their extreme position.

I am targeting a utility around 0.52 by conceding fully on issues A, B, and C while preserving issueD, my most important issue. Time is still only 0.30, so I should not yet give away the highest-weight issueD; the opponent has also shown no actual concession, repeatedly offering all valueA despite my gradual movement.

I am targeting a utility around 0.456 by keeping the already-conceded low/mid issues at valueA while making the first concession on the most important issueD from valueF to valueE. Time is still only 0.32, so I should not collapse to the opponent’s all-valueA demand, but their repeated identical offers suggest they are holding firm and may need a clearer concession signal.

I am targeting a utility around 0.392, conceding one further step on the high-weight issueD while keeping the rest at the opponent’s repeatedly signaled values. The opponent has held completely firm at all valueA with no messages, so at t=0.34 I should continue gradual concessions but not yet drop to their full demand before the deadline.

At t=0.36 there is still substantial time left, and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering the all-valueA bid worth only 0.20 to me. Since issueD is my most important issue, I should stop conceding there for now and test a slightly better package rather than continuing toward the opponent’s extreme demand.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.392 by conceding on lower-weight issues while preserving some value on the most important issueD. At t=0.38 there is still time left, but the opponent has held completely firm at all valueA bids, so I am making a further concession from my last offer without dropping to their full demand yet.

I am targeting a positive but more concessionary utility because the opponent has held completely firm at all valueA through t=0.40, so their revealed preference appears to favor lower values across all issues. Since we are in the mid-game rather than at the deadline, I will improve on my last offer for them by conceding issueD one step, while still preserving some value above reservation for me.

I targeted a modest utility around 0.37, since we are still before the deadline and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering the all-valueA bid worth only 0.20 to me. With issueD being my most important issue, I am keeping some value there while all lower-priority issues remain heavily conceded; there are no opponent messages to justify trusting anything beyond their firm offer pattern.

I am targeting a modest utility around 0.39 while avoiding further unnecessary concessions because we are still before the late phase. The opponent has held completely firm at all valueA with no messages or numerical concessions, so I will keep the high-weight issueD at a better value while conceding the lower-weight issues.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.437 by keeping issueD, my most important issue, at valueD while making substantial concessions on lower-weight issues. Time is still mid-negotiation, so despite the opponent holding completely firm at all valueA and giving no messages, I should not collapse to their bid yet; I also avoid repeating my exact previous offer.

I am targeting a modest mid-game utility around 0.424, slightly below my last offer but still well above the opponent's all-valueA bid utility of 0.20 to me. The opponent has made no concessions at all and sent no messages, so I am making a small concession in the high-weight issueD while compensating somewhat on issueC rather than collapsing to their fixed demand before the deadline.

I am targeting a moderate utility of about 0.392, conceding substantially on issueA, issueB, and issueC while preserving some value on issueD, my most important issue. At t=0.50 there is meaningful time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s unchanged all-valueA position; their offer history shows no concession and there are no messages to alter that assessment.

I targeted a modest positive utility around 0.33 by keeping only the most important issue slightly above the opponent’s repeated all-valueA demand. Since we are just past the midpoint and the opponent has shown no concession at all, I am making a clear concession from my last offer while still staying above reservation value. There are no opponent messages to weigh, and all observed opponent offers are the same valid all-valueA bid.

I am targeting a modest positive utility around 0.37 while still giving the opponent most of what their repeated all-valueA bids appear to demand. Since we are just past the midpoint and the opponent has shown no concession or messages, I am conceding mainly on lower/medium utility structure but still preserving some value on issueC and issueD rather than dropping to their exact bid yet.

I am targeting a moderate utility bid around 0.39, preserving value on the most important issueD while conceding fully on the lower-total combination of issueA, issueB, and issueC. At t=0.56 there is some time pressure, but the opponent has shown no concession at all and repeatedly offers the same all-valueA bid, so I should not collapse to their position yet. No messages were provided, so I rely only on the offer pattern.

At t=0.58 I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.33, conceding further but still protecting issueD, which is my highest-weight issue. The opponent has mostly held firm at all valueA, with only a recent move to issueD:valueB, so I treat that as a small concession and counter one step above it on issueD rather than accepting their low-utility bid.

I am targeting a modest utility around 0.305, above the opponent’s latest offer utility to me while conceding significantly from my earlier positions. At t=0.60 there is time pressure but not a final-deadline collapse, and the opponent has only moved from all valueA to issueD:valueB, so I will accept their signaled movement on issueD while asking for a small improvement on issueC.

I am targeting a modest utility of 0.26 by holding a small improvement on the most important issueD while conceding all other issues to the opponent’s repeated position. At t=0.62 there is meaningful time pressure, and the opponent has mostly held firm at all valueA but briefly signaled willingness to offer issueD: valueB, so I am proposing that signaled compromise rather than repeating my last bid.
